data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp employs a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and maintainability.

data.title: Real-Time Messaging Protocol
data.description: Supports real-time communication with low latency using XMPP protocol.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All messages are encrypted between the sender and receiver to ensure privacy.

data.title: Cross-Platform Compatibility
data.description: Available across multiple platforms, ensuring a consistent user experience.

data.title: High Availability Infrastructure
data.description: Designed to be highly available and resilient to failures.
